creator: Matt Philip

evidence.text: Matt Philip is the Director of Global Talent and Capability at ThoughtWorks. He has worked in software development as a coach, trainer, quality advocate and facilitator, helping organizations and teams to improve themselves and business outcomes. He is especially passionate about the Kanban method, continuous improvement and motivational design.
